metadata.name: formal_learning_theory_proof_world_model
metadata.description: Operational knowledge base encoding 21 metaprograms extracted from actual tactic sequences in the kernel. Each metaprogram is a reusable proof composition pattern: a DAG of TacticM transformations on MVarId goals with typed inputs, outputs, and failure diagnostics.
metadata.extraction_method: grep + agent analysis of by-blocks across 43 Lean4 source files

lean4_model.goal: MVarId with target Expr and LocalContext
lean4_model.metaprogram: sequence of TacticM transformations producing subgoals

metaprograms.name: M-Pipeline
metaprograms.description: Delegate to a single infrastructure lemma after extracting typeclass instances
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: have (extract instances) -> exact (single call to infrastructure)

metaprograms.name: M-Contrapositive
metaprograms.description: Assume negation, normalize, construct witness for contradiction
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: by_contra -> push_neg -> (construct witness or apply lemma) -> absurd/lt_irrefl/linarith

metaprograms.name: M-Construction
metaprograms.description: Build an explicit mathematical object (measure, function, set) and verify properties
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: let/set (construct) -> have (verify properties) -> refine/exact

instances.constructs: hard distribution on large shattered set

metaprograms.name: M-Bridge
metaprograms.description: Bridge between events via set monotonicity and measure calc chains
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: apply ge_trans/measure_mono -> calc chain through set containments

metaprograms.name: M-UnionBound
metaprograms.description: Bound measure of union by sum of individual measures
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: measure_biUnion_finset_le -> Finset.sum_le_sum -> sum_const -> arithmetic

metaprograms.name: M-Complement
metaprograms.description: Convert bad-event bound to good-event bound via complement probability
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: prob_compl_eq_one_sub -> tsub_le_tsub -> add_sub_cancel

metaprograms.name: M-IntegralBound
metaprograms.description: Reduce integral bound to pointwise bound via monotonicity
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: suffices (pointwise) -> integral_mono_of_nonneg -> integral_const

metaprograms.name: M-Pigeonhole
metaprograms.description: Prove injectivity of a map, then derive cardinality contradiction
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: have h_inj : Injective f -> cardinality comparison -> contradiction

metaprograms.name: M-Adversary
metaprograms.description: Induction on tree depth, branching on learner prediction at each node
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: induction n -> match .branch x l r -> by_cases hpred : L.predict s x = true -> simp -> omega

metaprograms.name: M-Potential
metaprograms.description: Induction on sequence with potential function (Ldim) strictly decreasing on mistakes
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: induction seq -> by_cases hmistake -> cases d zero/succ -> ldim_strict_decrease -> omega

metaprograms.name: M-LatticeMinMax
metaprograms.description: Three-way case split on WithBot(WithTop Nat), then lattice sup/inf manipulation
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: cases (bot/coe-top/coe-coe) -> le_antisymm -> iSup2_le/le_iSup2_of_le -> norm_cast -> omega

metaprograms.name: M-Locking
metaprograms.description: Recursive chain construction forcing learner commitment, then adversarial extension
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: Nat.rec (chain build) -> modular arithmetic -> List.ext_getElem -> funext -> omega
metaprograms.note: Paradigm-specific. Exploits enumeration structure. Cannot be applied to PAC or Online.

metaprograms.name: M-DefinitionUnfolding
metaprograms.description: Unfold piecewise definition via conditional rewrites, then case analysis
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: dif_pos/dif_neg/if_pos/if_neg -> by_cases (finiteness, convergence) -> lt_irrefl

metaprograms.name: M-WitnessConstruction
metaprograms.description: Build a concept class witness satisfying one condition and violating another
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: refine <..., ?_, ?_> -> (prove condition A) -> (prove not condition B)

metaprograms.name: M-ComponentMeasurability
metaprograms.description: Prove measurability of a piecewise-defined function component by component
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: simp only [definition] -> Measurable.piecewise + measurableSet_singleton

metaprograms.name: M-SetExtensionBridge
metaprograms.description: Prove set equality between learning-theoretic event and measure-theoretic preimage
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: ext -> simp only [domain definitions] -> constructor -> case analysis -> linarith/omega

metaprograms.name: M-AnalyticChain
metaprograms.description: Establish analyticity via Suslin projection, then transfer to NullMeasurableSet
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: AnalyticSet.preimage -> .analyticSet -> .iInter -> analyticSet_nullMeasurableSet

metaprograms.name: M-SurjectiveTransfer
metaprograms.description: Transfer non-measurability through a surjective measurable map
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: prove Measurable f + Surjective f -> measurableSet_preimage_iff_of_surjective -> contradiction

metaprograms.name: M-RectangleDecomposition
metaprograms.description: Decompose evaluation preimage into countable union of measurable rectangles
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: ext -> prove preimage = Union n, (A_n x B_n) -> MeasurableSet.iUnion -> .prod

metaprograms.name: M-ChoquetCapacitability
metaprograms.description: Recursive compact approximation via Nat.rec + closure intersection
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: le_antisymm -> Nat.rec (build compact sequence) -> iInter_closure -> Classical.choose

metaprograms.name: M-JensenChain
metaprograms.description: Per-hypothesis bound via Hoeffding, then uniformize via union bound + Jensen over posterior
metaprograms.tactic_pattern: per-h Hoeffding -> union bound (sum) -> Jensen (sqrt convexity) -> calc

failure_diagnostics.fix: Route to MP5 (union bound), skip MP4+symmetrization
Add typeclass or route to MP17 (analytic chain)

failure_diagnostics.trigger: UC uses forall D exists m0
failure_diagnostics.fix: Use uniform ordering: exists m0 forall D

failure_diagnostics.metaprogram: any with integration over exists h in C
failure_diagnostics.fix: Measurable inner event: find measurable E_inner subset E_target, monotonicity

paradigm_locking.detection: OnlineLearner.State or versionSpace or LTree in goal
DataStream or TextPresentation or MindChangeOrdinal in goal
AnalyticSet or NullMeasurableSet or PolishSpace in goal

theorem_inventory.coverage_note: 40 theorems are direct instances of the 21 metaprograms. 85 are private substeps within larger proofs. 153 are public infrastructure lemmas that support metaprogram execution but are not standalone instances. The 21 metaprograms cover all MAJOR proof strategies in the kernel; the infrastructure lemmas are the building blocks these strategies compose.
